mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ADM_LOGIN_HIST ( admin_id, login_rslt_cd, fail_rsn_cd, login_ip, user_agent, login_at ) VALUES ( #{adminId}, #{loginRsltCd}, #{failRsnCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginIp}, #{userAgent, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE BRD_POST_COMMENT SET del_yn = 'Y' WHERE comment_no = #{commentNo} AND del_yn = 'N'
UPDATE BRD_POST_MST SET approval_yn = IF(approval_yn = 'Y', 'N', 'Y'), approval_at = IF(approval_yn = 'Y', NOW(), NULL) WHERE post_no = #{postNo}
UPDATE BRD_POST_COMMENT SET approval_yn = IF(approval_yn = 'Y', 'N', 'Y'), approval_at = IF(approval_yn = 'Y', NOW(), NULL) WHERE comment_no = #{commentNo}
mapper.sql:
AND p.del_yn = 'N' AND p.board_gbn_cd = #{boardGbnCd} AND p.approval_yn = 'Y'
AND p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))
mapper.select:
SELECT p.post_no, p.board_gbn_cd, p.member_no, p.title, p.view_cnt, p.like_cnt, p.dislike_cnt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BRD_POST_COMMENT c2 WHERE c2.post_no = p.post_no AND c2.del_yn = 'N' AND c2.approval_yn = 'Y') AS comment_cnt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BRD_POST_COMMENT c3 WHERE c3.post_no = p.post_no AND c3.del_yn = 'N' AND c3.approval_yn = 'N') AS unapproved_comment_cnt, p.approval_yn, p.del_yn, p.create_ts, p.update_ts, COALESCE(m.nickname, IF(p.member_no = 0, (SELECT admin_id FROM ADM_LOGIN_INFO LIMIT 1), NULL)) AS nickname FROM BRD_POST_MST p LEFT JOIN MEM_JOIN_INFO m ON m.member_no = p.member_no WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY p.post_no DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BRD_POST_MST p WHERE 1=1
mapper.sql:
AND p.del_yn = 'N' AND p.board_gbn_cd = #{boardGbnCd} AND ( p.approval_yn = 'N' OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM BRD_POST_COMMENT c WHERE c.post_no = p.post_no AND c.del_yn = 'N' AND c.approval_yn = 'N' ) )
AND p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))
mapper.select:
SELECT p.post_no, p.board_gbn_cd, p.member_no, p.title, p.view_cnt, p.like_cnt, p.dislike_cnt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BRD_POST_COMMENT c2 WHERE c2.post_no = p.post_no AND c2.del_yn = 'N') AS comment_cnt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BRD_POST_COMMENT c3 WHERE c3.post_no = p.post_no AND c3.del_yn = 'N' AND c3.approval_yn = 'N') AS unapproved_comment_cnt, p.approval_yn, p.del_yn, p.create_ts, p.update_ts, COALESCE(m.nickname, IF(p.member_no = 0, (SELECT admin_id FROM ADM_LOGIN_INFO LIMIT 1), NULL)) AS nickname FROM BRD_POST_MST p LEFT JOIN MEM_JOIN_INFO m ON m.member_no = p.member_no WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY p.post_no DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.sql:
AND p.board_gbn_cd = #{boardGbnCd}
AND p.del_yn = 'N'
AND p.del_yn = 'N' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM BRD_POST_COMMENT c WHERE c.post_no = p.post_no AND c.del_yn = 'N' AND c.approval_yn = 'N' )
AND p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))
mapper.select:
SELECT p.post_no, p.board_gbn_cd, p.member_no, p.title, p.view_cnt, p.like_cnt, p.dislike_cnt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BRD_POST_COMMENT c2 WHERE c2.post_no = p.post_no AND c2.del_yn = 'N') AS comment_cnt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BRD_POST_COMMENT c3 WHERE c3.post_no = p.post_no AND c3.del_yn = 'N' AND c3.approval_yn = 'N') AS unapproved_comment_cnt, p.approval_yn, p.del_yn, p.create_ts, p.update_ts, COALESCE(m.nickname, IF(p.member_no = 0, (SELECT admin_id FROM ADM_LOGIN_INFO LIMIT 1), NULL)) AS nickname FROM BRD_POST_MST p LEFT JOIN MEM_JOIN_INFO m ON m.member_no = p.member_no WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY p.post_no DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BRD_POST_MST p WHERE 1=1

SELECT p.post_no, p.board_gbn_cd, p.member_no, p.title, p.content, p.view_cnt, p.like_cnt, p.dislike_cnt, p.comment_cnt, p.approval_yn, p.del_yn, p.create_ts, p.update_ts, COALESCE(m.nickname, IF(p.member_no = 0, (SELECT admin_id FROM ADM_LOGIN_INFO LIMIT 1), NULL)) AS nickname FROM BRD_POST_MST p LEFT JOIN MEM_JOIN_INFO m ON m.member_no = p.member_no WHERE p.post_no = #{postNo} AND p.board_gbn_cd = '02'
mapper.update: UPDATE BRD_POST_MST SET del_ts = IF(del_yn = 'N', NOW(), NULL), del_yn = IF(del_yn = 'N', 'Y', 'N') WHERE post_no = #{postNo} AND board_gbn_cd = '02'
UPDATE BRD_POST_MST SET approval_yn = 'Y', approval_at = NOW() WHERE post_no = #{postNo}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BRD_POST_MST p WHERE 1=1

SELECT login_hist_no, admin_id, login_rslt_cd, fail_rsn_cd, login_ip, user_agent, DATE_FORMAT(login_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS login_at_str, DATE_FORMAT(logout_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS logout_at_str FROM ADM_LOGIN_HIST ORDER BY login_hist_no DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT user_id, user_name, nickname, reg_ip, mem_grade_cd, (SELECT code_nm FROM COM_CODE_DTL WHERE code_grp_id = 'C012' AND code_id = A.mem_grade_cd) AS mem_grade_nm, DATE_FORMAT(last_login_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS last_login_at, DATE_FORMAT(create_ts, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS create_ts FROM MEM_JOIN_INFO A ORDER BY create_ts DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT code_grp_id, code_grp_nm, use_yn, sort_ord, remark, DATE_FORMAT(create_ts, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS create_ts, DATE_FORMAT(update_ts, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS update_ts FROM COM_CODE_MST ORDER BY sort_ord ASC, code_grp_id ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COM_CODE_MST WHERE code_grp_id = #{codeGrpId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COM_CODE_MST (code_grp_id, code_grp_nm, use_yn, sort_ord, remark, create_ts) VALUES (#{codeGrpId}, #{codeGrpNm}, #{useYn}, #{sortOrd}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE COM_CODE_MST SET code_grp_nm = #{codeGrpNm}, use_yn = #{useYn}, sort_ord = #{sortOrd}, remark = #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_ts = NOW() WHERE code_grp_id = #{codeGrpId}
mapper.select: SELECT code_grp_id, code_id, code_nm, code_nm_en, use_yn, sort_ord, etc_val1, etc_val2, remark, DATE_FORMAT(create_ts, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS create_ts, DATE_FORMAT(update_ts, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS update_ts FROM COM_CODE_DTL WHERE code_grp_id = #{codeGrpId} ORDER BY sort_ord ASC, code_id ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COM_CODE_DTL WHERE code_grp_id = #{codeGrpId} AND code_id = #{codeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COM_CODE_DTL (code_grp_id, code_id, code_nm, code_nm_en, use_yn, sort_ord, etc_val1, etc_val2, remark, create_ts) VALUES (#{codeGrpId}, #{codeId}, #{codeNm}, #{codeNmEn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{useYn}, #{sortOrd}, #{etcVal1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{etcVal2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE COM_CODE_DTL SET code_nm = #{codeNm}, code_nm_en = #{codeNmEn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, use_yn = #{useYn}, sort_ord = #{sortOrd}, etc_val1 = #{etcVal1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, etc_val2 = #{etcVal2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remark = #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_ts = NOW() WHERE code_grp_id = #{codeGrpId} AND code_id = #{codeId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM COM_CODE_DTL WHERE code_grp_id = #{codeGrpId} AND code_id = #{codeId}
